scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[field0]@[field2];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[field5] From: <sip:[field0]@[field2]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field2]> Call-ID: REGISTER///[call_id] User-Agent: pqrxyz CSeq: [cseq] REGISTER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport];avaya-sc-enabled>;q=1;expires=120;+avaya.gmtoffset="0:00";+avaya.js-ver="1.0";+avaya.model="n/a";+avaya.sn="n/a";+avaya.firmware="n/a";+sip.instance="<urn:uuid:0da99e27-89ad-f8a0-1762-4e2a9b52e4df>";reg-id=1, <sip:[field0]abcde@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport];avaya-sc-enabled>;q=1;expires=120;+avaya.gmtoffset="0:05";+avaya.js-ver="1.0";+avaya.model="n/a";+avaya.sn="n/a";+avaya.firmware="n/a";+sip.instance="<urn:uuid:0da99e30-89adf-f8aap0-17623-4e2a9b572e4df>";reg-id=1 Max-Forwards: 70 Supported: eventlist,feature-ref,replaces,tdialog Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PUBLISH,UPDATE Content-Length: 0
